issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' but the condition context is wrong: this effect triggers when THIS card is KO'd, not when leader is on board
Condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Leader' is incorrect. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with type 'Baroque Works' to check if leader has that type
Action type 'FlipLife' is completely wrong. Should be 'SearchDeck' or similar to add Event from trash to hand. The correct action should retrieve an Event card from trash
Missing action parameters: should specify target (Event cards in trash) and destination (hand). Action needs 'count: 1' and card filter

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On K.O.] If your Leader has the {Baroque Works} type, add up to 1 Event from your trash to your hand.
